providers.subtitle: High-quality voice synthesis for conversations and read-aloud. Requires an ElevenLabs API key.
providers.setupHint: Run the setup commands in your terminal to configure ElevenLabs credentials.

credentialsGuide.description: Sign in to ElevenLabs, go to your Profile, and copy your API key.

providers.subtitle: Natural-sounding voice synthesis with custom voice cloning. Requires a Fish Audio API key and voice reference ID.
providers.setupHint: Run the setup commands in your terminal to configure Fish Audio.

credentialsGuide.description: Sign in to Fish Audio, navigate to API Keys in your dashboard, and create a new key.

providers.subtitle: Fast, accurate text-to-speech synthesis. Uses the same API key as Deepgram speech-to-text.
providers.setupHint: Run the setup command in your terminal to configure your Deepgram API key.

credentialsGuide.description: Sign in to Deepgram, navigate to your API Keys page, and create or copy an existing key.
